name: Deepak Sundaram
summary: I am a graphic designer with 2 years experience who wants to become a UI/UX designer. I know Photoshop and have made some Figma screens. I am creative and I work hard.

experience.title: Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Designed print advertisements, brochures, and banner stands for local clients.
Made social media graphics using Canva and Photoshop.
Worked with print vendors to finalize designs for production.

design_disciplines: Basic Digital UI (no user testing experience)

projects.name: Taxi App Screens (Personal Practice)
projects.description: Copied and recreated a taxi booking app UI from a YouTube tutorial in Figma. No original design work or user research involved.

achievements: Designed award-winning brochure for a local NGO charity run (2023)
